case_title: UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP. vs. MILLER, AUDREY DBA AL MILLER GENERAL CONTRACTOR

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, AUDREY DBA AL MILLER GENERAL CONTRACTOR SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-23-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-03-1993
NOTICE OF NEW STATUS CONFERENCE DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP. SERVED MAR-10-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, AUDREY DBA AL MILLER GENERAL CONTRACTOR
ORDER & DECLARATION FILED DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY IS PENDING NEW COURT DATE 11-23-93, PLTF TO GIVE NOTICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-21-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 BANKRUPTCY STATUS. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE OF RULING ON PLTF'S REQUEST TO KEEP CASE OPEN PENDING DEFT'S COMPETION OF CHAPTER 13 BANKRUPTCY FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ADDITIONAL TIME TO EFFECT SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-23-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-23-1993, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-23-1993, CONTINUED TO JUN-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-23-1993, CONTINUED TO JUN-21-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CASE TO REMAIN OPEN FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS. HEARING SET FOR DECEMBER 23, 1993 AND RESET FOR 6/23/94. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER TO KEEP CASE OPEN WHILE BANKRUPTCY IS PENDING SEE DOCUMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED MERCHANTS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA CORP.
